name: psst-gpt
description: Relay Codex prompts and source upload audits through the ChatGPT macOS desktop app.

interface.shortDescription: Send ChatGPT app tasks and source uploads.
interface.longDescription: PsstGPT controls an already-open macOS ChatGPT desktop app window through Accessibility automation, sends text prompts in strict-background mode, can package large codebases into one source archive for direct Swift Accessibility upload audits, waits for a stable assistant response capture with no default overall response timeout, stores app-session metadata, and returns the response to Codex. It is an independent desktop-app implementation inspired by the original Chrome-backed GPT Relay by Prompt Case, but it does not use Chrome or the browser extension.
defaultPrompt: Send this to the ChatGPT app.
Continue in the active ChatGPT app chat.
